texto: You see, Marcus, some things have value yet have no price, and a wise man learns them and their worth. So do not let the standard of the marketplace be your guide. A man goes there for flour and greens, but not for virtue.
explicacao: Citação de Paul Waters sobre temas ligados a sabedoria. “You see, Marcus, some things have value yet have no price, and a wise man learns them and their w…” articula sabedoria, character, reflexao em registro de sabedoria, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
